results.title: Rams QB Matthew Stafford agrees to 1-year, $55 million extension
results.description: Quarterback Matthew Stafford has signed a contract extension with the Los Angeles Rams, the team announced on Thursday. The deal, which adds one year and $55 million to his current contract, will keep Stafford with the Rams for the 2026...

results.title: ‘History will prove me right’: Inside Magnussen’s Enhanced Games gamble
results.description: James Magnussen’s resting heart rate is down to 28 beats per minute as he prepares to go all-in on the world’s most controversial sporting experiment taking place in Las Vegas on Sunday.

results.title: Boxing, beers, and his unusual pre-game routine: The Scott Pendlebury you don’t know
results.description: Scott Pendlebury learnt early that the only way to become the best was to put himself in positions where he was no longer the best – but that is not all, as we discovered when he spoke to The Age ahead of his record-breaking game.
